ddls:
CREATE TABLE "pandemic_data" (
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the data */,
  "days_since_shutdown" INTEGER /* Number of days since the pandemic shutdown */,
  "daily_confirmed_cases" INTEGER /* Number of confirmed cases for the day */,
  "total_confirmed_cases" INTEGER /* Total number of confirmed cases */,
  "daily_deaths" INTEGER /* Number of deaths for the day */,
  "total_deaths" INTEGER /* Total number of deaths */,
  "daily_recovered" INTEGER /* Number of recovered cases for the day */,
  "total_recovered" INTEGER /* Total number of recovered cases */,
  "active_cases" INTEGER /* Number of active cases */,
  "daily_tested" INTEGER /* Number of tests conducted for the day */,
  "cumulative_tests" INTEGER /* Cumulative number of tests */,
  "daily_hospitalization" INTEGER /* Number of hospitalizations for the day */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the region */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the individual */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the individual */,
  "vaccination_status" TEXT /* Vaccination status of the individual */,
  "quarantine_status" TEXT /* Quarantine status of the individual */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("date", "region_id", "age_group", "gender")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographic latitude of the region */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographic longitude of the region */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the region in square kilometers */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the region */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the region's data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic entry */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the individual */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the individual */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Region where the individual is located */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the individual */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the individual */,
  "is_health_worker" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the individual is a healthcare worker */,
  "is_vaccinated" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the individual is vaccinated */,
  "vaccination_date" TEXT /* Date of vaccination (if applicable) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the demographic data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure authentication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user has administrative privileges */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object containing specific permissions for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
column_names: Number of days since the pandemic shutdown
Number of confirmed cases for the day
Number of deaths for the day
Number of recovered cases for the day
Number of tests conducted for the day
Number of hospitalizations for the day
